subject: Fancelli's visit
body:
Dear Jeffrey,
I went to see some progress on the Office Library, it looks terrific. I met with the lighting people, and the lighting is soothing and perfect. Also,?you can see the structure for the ceiling, it is very complicated, I know it will be very rustic, but it has to make sense. If we want the inverted boat to float, it has to be well built.? The wood finish can easily be adjusted, not the way is built. Regarding the Library, all the mouldings for the mock up are done, but it will be finished as I told you by the end of November, as scheduled.
I am looking forward to see you by the end of next week, where I will have a few things for you to see. I hope that you will feel more confortable and that you will not think you just have a set of sh...y plans. J.P.
Photo #1? Moldes for the lower ceiling under the balcony. (Library)
Photo #2? Marquetry panels behind the columns.(Library)
Photo #3? Mock up of the ceiling corner. (Office)
Photo?#4? One of the 16 bookcases with the sculpted columns and a study of the lighting. (Office)
Photo?#5? Ceiling. It will be rough timber, but assembled like a boat's skull.







?
body_html:
Dear Jeffrey,
I went to see some progress on the Office Library, it looks terrific. I met with the lighting people, and the lighting is soothing and perfect. Also, you can see the structure for the ceiling, it is very complicated, I know it will be very rustic, but it has to make sense. If we want the inverted boat to float, it has to be well built.  The wood finish can easily be adjusted, not the way is built. Regarding the Library, all the mouldings for the mock up are done, but it will be finished as I told you by the end of November, as scheduled.
I am looking forward to see you by the end of next week, where I will have a few things for you to see. I hope that you will feel more confortable and that you will not think you just have a set of sh...y plans. J.P.
Photo #1  Moldes for the lower ceiling under the balcony. (Library)
Photo #2  Marquetry panels behind the columns.(Library)
Photo #3  Mock up of the ceiling corner. (Office)
Photo #4  One of the 16 bookcases with the sculpted columns and a study of the lighting. (Office)
Photo #5  Ceiling. It will be rough timber, but assembled like a boat's skull.
